RADPx-OS Kernel (Radical Posix OS)  Crimson 0.1.4
POSIX-inspired kernel API with embedded and desktop VM targets
radkernel.h
Go to the documentation of this file.

26 #define RADEK_VERSION_MAJOR 0
27 #define RADEK_VERSION_MINOR 1
28 #define RADEK_VERSION_PATCH 2
29 
30 #define RAD_IOCTL_NONE 0u
31 #define RAD_IOCTL_WRITE 1u
32 #define RAD_IOCTL_READ 2u
33 #define RAD_IOCTL_READWRITE 3u
34 #define RAD_IOCTL(dir, type, nr, size) ((((uint32_t)(dir) & 3u) << 30) | (((uint32_t)(size) & 0x3fffu) << 16) | (((uint32_t)(type) & 0xffu) << 8) | ((uint32_t)(nr) & 0xffu))
35 #define RAD_IO(type, nr) RAD_IOCTL(RAD_IOCTL_NONE, type, nr, 0u)
36 #define RAD_IOR(type, nr, type_name) RAD_IOCTL(RAD_IOCTL_READ, type, nr, sizeof(type_name))
37 #define RAD_IOW(type, nr, type_name) RAD_IOCTL(RAD_IOCTL_WRITE, type, nr, sizeof(type_name))
38 #define RAD_IOWR(type, nr, type_name) RAD_IOCTL(RAD_IOCTL_READWRITE, type, nr, sizeof(type_name))
39 #define RAD_IOCTL_DIR(request) (((uint32_t)(request) >> 30) & 3u)
40 #define RAD_IOCTL_SIZE(request) (((uint32_t)(request) >> 16) & 0x3fffu)
41 #define RAD_IOCTL_TYPE(request) (((uint32_t)(request) >> 8) & 0xffu)
42 #define RAD_IOCTL_NR(request) ((uint32_t)(request) & 0xffu)
43 
44 #define RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_I2C 'I'
45 #define RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_SPI 'S'
46 #define RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_AUDIO 'A'
47 #define RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_SERIAL 'T'
48 #define RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_FRAMEBUFFER 'F'
49 #define RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_INPUT 'K'
50 #define RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_BLOCK 'B'
51 #define RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_NET 'N'
52 #define RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_COMPOSITOR 'C'
53 #define RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_USB 'U'
54 #define RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_TTY 'Y'
55 
56 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_I2C_TRANSFER RAD_IOWR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_I2C, 1u, struct rad_i2c_transfer)
57 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_SPI_TRANSFER RAD_IOWR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_SPI, 1u, struct rad_spi_transfer)
58 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_AUDIO_CONFIGURE RAD_IOW(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_AUDIO, 1u, struct rad_audio_format)
59 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_SERIAL_CONFIGURE RAD_IOW(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_SERIAL, 1u, struct rad_serial_config)
60 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_FRAMEBUFFER_INFO RAD_IOR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_FRAMEBUFFER, 1u, struct rad_framebuffer_info)
61 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_FRAMEBUFFER_FLUSH RAD_IOW(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_FRAMEBUFFER, 2u, struct rad_framebuffer_rect)
62 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_BLOCK_INFO RAD_IOR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_BLOCK, 1u, struct rad_block_info)
63 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_BLOCK_READ RAD_IOWR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_BLOCK, 2u, struct rad_block_request)
64 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_BLOCK_WRITE RAD_IOWR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_BLOCK, 3u, struct rad_block_request)
65 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_BLOCK_FLUSH RAD_IO(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_BLOCK, 4u)
66 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_NET_LINK_INFO RAD_IOR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_NET, 1u, struct rad_net_link_info)
67 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_NET_SEND RAD_IOW(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_NET, 2u, struct rad_net_packet)
68 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_NET_POLL RAD_IO(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_NET, 3u)
69 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_NET_RECV RAD_IOWR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_NET, 4u, struct rad_net_packet)
70 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_NET_STACK_INFO RAD_IOR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_NET, 5u, struct rad_net_stack_info)
71 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_NET_NTP_QUERY RAD_IOWR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_NET, 6u, struct rad_ntp_query)
72 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_NET_CONFIGURE RAD_IOW(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_NET, 7u, struct rad_net_stack_config)
73 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_COMPOSITOR_CREATE_SURFACE RAD_IOWR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_COMPOSITOR, 1u, struct rad_compositor_ipc_surface)
74 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_COMPOSITOR_QUEUE_DAMAGE RAD_IOW(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_COMPOSITOR, 2u, struct rad_compositor_ipc_damage)
75 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_FRAMEBUFFER_PRESENT RAD_IOW(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_FRAMEBUFFER, 3u, struct rad_framebuffer_present)
76 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_USB_HOST_INFO RAD_IOR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_USB, 1u, struct rad_usb_host_info)
77 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_TTY_GET_WINSIZE RAD_IOR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_TTY, 1u, struct rad_tty_window_size)
78 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_TTY_SET_WINSIZE RAD_IOW(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_TTY, 2u, struct rad_tty_window_size)
79 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_TTY_GET_MODE RAD_IOR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_TTY, 3u, uint32_t)
80 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_TTY_SET_MODE RAD_IOW(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_TTY, 4u, uint32_t)
81 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_TTY_GET_TERMIOS RAD_IOR(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_TTY, 5u, struct rad_tty_termios)
82 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_TTY_SET_TERMIOS RAD_IOW(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_TTY, 6u, struct rad_tty_termios)
83 #define RAD_DEVICE_IOCTL_TTY_FLUSH RAD_IOW(RAD_IOCTL_TYPE_TTY, 7u, uint32_t)
84

95 #define RAD_BOOT_HANDOFF_FLAG_INTERRUPTS_MASKED 0x00000020u

98 #define RAD_OVERLAY_VERSION 1u

125 #define RAD_SOCK_DGRAM 2u
126 #define RAD_SOCK_STREAM 1u
127 #define RAD_IPPROTO_UDP 17u
128 #define RAD_IPPROTO_TCP 6u

131 #define RAD_INPUT_QUEUE_NAME_MAX 64u

142 typedef enum rad_status {
143  RAD_STATUS_OK = 0,
144  RAD_STATUS_ERROR = -1,
145  RAD_STATUS_INVALID_ARGUMENT = -2,
146  RAD_STATUS_NOT_FOUND = -3,
147  RAD_STATUS_NO_MEMORY = -4,
148  RAD_STATUS_TIMEOUT = -5,
149  RAD_STATUS_NOT_SUPPORTED = -6,
150  RAD_STATUS_ALREADY_EXISTS = -7,
151  RAD_STATUS_NOT_INITIALIZED = -8
152 } rad_status_t;

173 typedef enum rad_posix_syscall {
174  RAD_SYSCALL_READ = 0,
175  RAD_SYSCALL_WRITE = 1,
176  RAD_SYSCALL_OPEN = 2,
177  RAD_SYSCALL_CLOSE = 3,
178  RAD_SYSCALL_IOCTL = 4,
179  RAD_SYSCALL_LSEEK = 5,
180  RAD_SYSCALL_STAT = 6,
181  RAD_SYSCALL_FSTAT = 7,
182  RAD_SYSCALL_GETTIMEOFDAY = 8,
183  RAD_SYSCALL_NANOSLEEP = 9,
184  RAD_SYSCALL_EXIT = 10,
185  RAD_SYSCALL_FORK = 11,
186  RAD_SYSCALL_EXECVE = 12,
187  RAD_SYSCALL_WAITPID = 13,
188  RAD_SYSCALL_GETPID = 14,
189  RAD_SYSCALL_GETPPID = 15,
190  RAD_SYSCALL_DUP = 16,
191  RAD_SYSCALL_DUP2 = 17,
192  RAD_SYSCALL_CHDIR = 18,
193  RAD_SYSCALL_GETCWD = 19,
194  RAD_SYSCALL_BRK = 20,
195  RAD_SYSCALL_PIPE = 21,
196  RAD_SYSCALL_FCNTL = 22,
197  RAD_SYSCALL_ACCESS = 23,
198  RAD_SYSCALL_ISATTY = 24,
199  RAD_SYSCALL_SOCKET = 25,
200  RAD_SYSCALL_BIND = 26,
201  RAD_SYSCALL_CONNECT = 27,
202  RAD_SYSCALL_LISTEN = 28,
203  RAD_SYSCALL_ACCEPT = 29,
204  RAD_SYSCALL_SENDTO = 30,
205  RAD_SYSCALL_RECVFROM = 31,
206  RAD_SYSCALL_SHUTDOWN = 32,
207  RAD_SYSCALL_SETSOCKOPT = 33,
208  RAD_SYSCALL_GETSOCKOPT = 34,
209  RAD_SYSCALL_MMAP = 35,
210  RAD_SYSCALL_MUNMAP = 36,
211  RAD_SYSCALL_SHM_OPEN = 37,
212  RAD_SYSCALL_SHM_UNLINK = 38,
213  RAD_SYSCALL_POLL = 39,
214  RAD_SYSCALL_SETTIMEOFDAY = 40,
215  RAD_SYSCALL_GETDENTS = 1000,
216  RAD_SYSCALL_REMOVE = 1001,
217  RAD_SYSCALL_MKDIR = 1002,
218  RAD_SYSCALL_RMDIR = 1003,
219  RAD_SYSCALL_RENAME = 1004,
220  RAD_SYSCALL_TRUNCATE = 1005,
221  RAD_SYSCALL_LOG_READ = 1006,
222  RAD_SYSCALL_LOG_FLUSH = 1007,
223  RAD_SYSCALL_GETUID = 1008,
224  RAD_SYSCALL_GETEUID = 1009,
225  RAD_SYSCALL_GETGID = 1010,
226  RAD_SYSCALL_GETEGID = 1011,
227  RAD_SYSCALL_SETUID = 1012,
228  RAD_SYSCALL_SETGID = 1013,
229  RAD_SYSCALL_CHMOD = 1014,
230  RAD_SYSCALL_LINK = 1015,
231  RAD_SYSCALL_SYMLINK = 1016,
232  RAD_SYSCALL_READLINK = 1017,
233  RAD_SYSCALL_FSYNC = 1018,
234  RAD_SYSCALL_KILL = 1019,
235  RAD_SYSCALL_FCHDIR = 1020,
236  RAD_SYSCALL_FTRUNCATE = 1021,
237  RAD_SYSCALL_UTIME = 1022,
238  RAD_SYSCALL_GETPGID = 1023,
239  RAD_SYSCALL_SETPGID = 1024,
240  RAD_SYSCALL_GETSID = 1025,
241  RAD_SYSCALL_SETSID = 1026,
242  RAD_SYSCALL_TCGETPGRP = 1027,
243  RAD_SYSCALL_TCSETPGRP = 1028,
244  RAD_SYSCALL_PIPE2 = 1029
245 } rad_posix_syscall_t;

441 #define RAD_TASK_CORE_ANY (-1)
442 #define RAD_TASK_CORE_SERVICE 0
443 
445 typedef enum rad_task_state {
446  RAD_TASK_NEW = 0,
447  RAD_TASK_READY = 1,
448  RAD_TASK_RUNNING = 2,
449  RAD_TASK_SLEEPING = 3,
450  RAD_TASK_BLOCKED = 4,
451  RAD_TASK_FINISHED = 5,
452  RAD_TASK_DETACHED = 6
453 } rad_task_state_t;
454 
456 typedef struct rad_kernel_config {
457  const char *backend_name;
458  const void *boot_info;
459 } rad_kernel_config_t;
460 
462 typedef struct rad_boot_arg {
463  char key[RAD_BOOT_MAX_STRING];
464  char value[RAD_BOOT_MAX_STRING];
465 } rad_boot_arg_t;
466 
468 typedef struct rad_boot_memory_region {
469  uint64_t base;
470  uint64_t size;
471  uint32_t type;
472  uint32_t flags;
473  char name[RAD_BOOT_MAX_STRING];
474 } rad_boot_memory_region_t;
475 
477 typedef struct rad_boot_info {
478  uint32_t size;
479  uint32_t version;
480  char backend[RAD_BOOT_MAX_STRING];
481  char board[RAD_BOOT_MAX_STRING];
482  char console_device[RAD_BOOT_MAX_STRING];
483  char sd_mode[RAD_BOOT_MAX_STRING];
484  uintptr_t fdt_pointer;
485  uintptr_t initrd_pointer;
486  uint32_t boot_flags;
487  uint32_t memory_region_count;
488  rad_boot_memory_region_t memory_regions[RAD_BOOT_MAX_MEMORY_REGIONS];
489  uint32_t arg_count;
490  rad_boot_arg_t args[RAD_BOOT_MAX_ARGS];
491 } rad_boot_info_t;
492 
494 typedef struct rad_boot_handoff {
495  uint32_t magic;
496  uint32_t version;
497  uint32_t size;
498  uint32_t flags;
499  rad_boot_info_t boot;
500  uintptr_t kernel_image_base;
501  uintptr_t kernel_image_size;
502  uintptr_t kernel_entry;
503  uintptr_t stack_base;
504  uintptr_t stack_size;
505  uintptr_t fdt_pointer;
506  uintptr_t initrd_pointer;
507  uintptr_t peripheral_base;
508  uintptr_t mailbox_base;
509  uintptr_t local_interrupt_base;
510  uintptr_t arm_memory_base;
511  uintptr_t arm_memory_size;
512  uint32_t board_id;
513  uint32_t entry_el;
514  uint32_t core_count;
515  uint32_t parked_core_mask;
516  char payload_name[RAD_BOOT_MAX_STRING];
517 } rad_boot_handoff_t;
518 
520 typedef struct rad_memory_stats {
521  uint64_t allocations;
522  uint64_t frees;
523  uint64_t bytes_allocated;
524  uint64_t bytes_freed;
525  uint64_t bytes_live;
526  uint64_t peak_bytes_live;
527 } rad_memory_stats_t;
528 
530 typedef struct rad_perf_counter_info {
531  char name[RAD_PERF_NAME_MAX];
532  uint64_t value;
533 } rad_perf_counter_info_t;
534 
536 typedef struct rad_timer_source_config {
537  uint32_t size;
538  const char *name;
539  uint32_t frequency_hz;
540  int supports_oneshot;
541 } rad_timer_source_config_t;
542 
544 typedef struct rad_timer_source_ops {
545  void *context;
546  rad_status_t (*start_periodic)(void *context, uint32_t frequency_hz);
547  rad_status_t (*schedule_oneshot)(void *context, uint64_t delay_micros);
548  rad_status_t (*cancel_oneshot)(void *context);
549 } rad_timer_source_ops_t;
550 
552 typedef struct rad_timer_source_info {
553  char name[RAD_TIMER_NAME_MAX];
554  uint32_t frequency_hz;
555  int supports_oneshot;
556  int active;
557  uint64_t ticks;
558 } rad_timer_source_info_t;
559 
561 typedef struct rad_task_info {
562  uint64_t id;
563  char name[64];
564  int running;
565  int finished;
566  rad_task_state_t state;
567  int target_core;
568  int current_core;
569  int priority;
570  size_t stack_size;
571  int detached;
572 } rad_task_info_t;
573 
575 typedef struct rad_task_config {
576  uint32_t size;
577  const char *name;
578  size_t stack_size;
579  int target_core;
580  int priority;
581  void *user_context;
582 } rad_task_config_t;
583 
585 typedef struct rad_core_info {
586  uint32_t detected_cores;
587  uint32_t worker_cores;
588  uint32_t service_core;
589  uint32_t worker_running_mask;
590 } rad_core_info_t;
591 
593 typedef enum rad_scheduler_mode {
594  RAD_SCHEDULER_COOPERATIVE = 0,
595  RAD_SCHEDULER_PREEMPTIVE = 1
596 } rad_scheduler_mode_t;
597 
599 typedef struct rad_scheduler_info {
600  uint32_t detected_cores;
601  uint32_t worker_running_mask;
602  uint32_t running_threads;
603  uint32_t ready_threads;
604  uint32_t blocked_threads;
605  uint32_t sleeping_threads;
606  uint32_t exited_threads;
607  uint32_t process_count;
608  int preemption_supported;
609  rad_scheduler_mode_t mode;
610  char arch[32];
611  uint32_t online_core_mask;
612  uint32_t current_core;
613  int preemption_enabled;
614  uint64_t context_switches;
615  uint64_t scheduler_ticks;
616 } rad_scheduler_info_t;
617 
619 typedef enum rad_tree_property_type {
620  RAD_TREE_PROP_BOOL = 1,
621  RAD_TREE_PROP_U32 = 2,
622  RAD_TREE_PROP_STRING = 3,
623  RAD_TREE_PROP_U32_ARRAY = 4,
624  RAD_TREE_PROP_STRING_ARRAY = 5

628 typedef struct rad_tree_node_handle *rad_tree_node_t;

631 typedef struct rad_tree_node_info {

635  char module[RAD_TREE_MAX_PROPERTY_NAME];
636  int bound;

687 } rad_mac_address_t;

690 typedef struct rad_ipv4_address {

695 typedef struct rad_net_packet {

712 typedef struct rad_net_stack_info {

717  rad_ipv4_address_t ntp_server;
718  uint16_t ntp_port;
719  uint16_t arp_entries;
720  uint64_t ethernet_rx;
721  uint64_t ethernet_tx;
722  uint64_t arp_rx;
723  uint64_t arp_tx;
724  uint64_t ipv4_rx;
725  uint64_t ipv4_tx;
726  uint64_t udp_rx;
727  uint64_t udp_tx;
728  uint64_t icmp_rx;
729  uint64_t icmp_tx;
730 } rad_net_stack_info_t;

733 typedef struct rad_net_stack_config {

773 typedef enum rad_tcp_state {
774  RAD_TCP_CLOSED = 0,
775  RAD_TCP_LISTEN = 1,

777  RAD_TCP_SYN_RECEIVED = 3,
778  RAD_TCP_ESTABLISHED = 4,

782  RAD_TCP_TIME_WAIT = 8

812 typedef struct rad_process_info {

822 } rad_process_info_t;

825 typedef struct rad_process_arch_ops {

827  void *context;
828  int32_t (*fork_from_frame)(void *context, void *trap_frame);
829  void (*process_reaped)(void *context, int32_t pid, int32_t status);
830 } rad_process_arch_ops_t;

833 typedef struct rad_vfs_dirent {
834  char name[96];
835  rad_vfs_stat_t stat;
836 } rad_vfs_dirent_t;
837 
839 typedef struct rad_dirent_user {
840  uint8_t type;
841  char name[256];
842 } rad_dirent_user_t;
843 
845 typedef int (*rad_vfs_list_callback_t)(const char *name, const rad_vfs_stat_t *stat, void *context);
846 
848 typedef struct rad_vfs_backend_ops {
849  void *context;
850  rad_status_t (*open)(void *context, const char *path, uint32_t flags, void **file);
851  rad_status_t (*read)(void *file, void *buffer, size_t size, size_t *bytes_read);
852  rad_status_t (*write)(void *file, const void *buffer, size_t size, size_t *bytes_written);
853  rad_status_t (*seek)(void *file, int64_t offset, rad_seek_origin_t origin);
854  uint64_t (*tell)(void *file);
855  void (*close)(void *file);
856  rad_status_t (*stat)(void *context, const char *path, rad_vfs_stat_t *stat);
857  rad_status_t (*list)(void *context, const char *path, rad_vfs_list_callback_t callback, void *callback_context);
858  rad_status_t (*mkdir)(void *context, const char *path);
859  rad_status_t (*remove)(void *context, const char *path);
860  rad_status_t (*rename)(void *context, const char *old_path, const char *new_path);
861  rad_status_t (*rmdir)(void *context, const char *path);
862  rad_status_t (*fsync)(void *file);
863  rad_status_t (*truncate)(void *context, const char *path, uint64_t size);
864  rad_status_t (*readlink)(void *context, const char *path, char *buffer, size_t size);
865  rad_status_t (*symlink)(void *context, const char *target, const char *link_path);
866  rad_status_t (*link)(void *context, const char *old_path, const char *new_path);
867  rad_status_t (*chmod)(void *context, const char *path, uint32_t mode);
868 } rad_vfs_backend_ops_t;
869 
871 typedef enum rad_program_state {
872  RAD_PROGRAM_LOADED = 0,
873  RAD_PROGRAM_RUNNING = 1,
874  RAD_PROGRAM_FINISHED = 2,

876 } rad_program_state_t;

954  rad_status_t (*present)(void *context, const rad_framebuffer_present_t *present);
955  rad_status_t (*set_mode)(void *context, const rad_display_mode_t *mode);
956  rad_status_t (*blank)(void *context, int blanked);
957  uint64_t (*get_vsync_counter)(void *context);

1067  uint8_t *rx_data;

1074 } rad_spi_transfer_t;

1082 typedef struct rad_dma_channel_handle *rad_dma_channel_t;

1085 typedef struct rad_dma_transfer {

1088  rad_dma_request_id_t request_id;

1090  void *destination;

1092  uint32_t flags;
1093 } rad_dma_transfer_t;
1094 
1096 typedef struct rad_dma_backend_ops {
1097  void *context;
1098  rad_status_t (*request)(void *context, rad_dma_request_id_t request_id, void **backend_channel);
1099  void (*release)(void *context, void *backend_channel);
1100  rad_status_t (*submit)(void *context, void *backend_channel, const rad_dma_transfer_t *transfer);
1101  rad_status_t (*wait)(void *context, void *backend_channel, uint32_t timeout_ms);
1102  rad_status_t (*cancel)(void *context, void *backend_channel);
1103 } rad_dma_backend_ops_t;
1104

1110 } rad_dma_controller_config_t;
1111

1116  rad_status_t (*transfer_dma)(void *context, const rad_spi_device_t *device, const rad_spi_transfer_t *transfer, rad_dma_channel_t tx_channel, rad_dma_channel_t rx_channel);
1117 } rad_spi_controller_ops_t;
1118

1127  uint8_t tx_gpio;

1129  uint8_t cs_gpio;

1133 typedef struct rad_spi_driver {

1136  const char *compatible;

1143 typedef struct rad_module_descriptor {

1145  const char *name;

1147  const char *compatible;

1149  void (*exit)(void *context);
1150  void *context;
1151 } rad_module_descriptor_t;
1152 
1154 typedef enum rad_module_state {
1155  RAD_MODULE_REGISTERED = 1,
1156  RAD_MODULE_INITIALIZED = 2,
1157  RAD_MODULE_FAILED = 3,
1158  RAD_MODULE_EXITED = 4
1159 } rad_module_state_t;
1160 
1162 typedef enum rad_service_state {
1163  RAD_SERVICE_REGISTERED = 1,
1164  RAD_SERVICE_CONFIGURED = 2,
1165  RAD_SERVICE_RUNNING = 3,
1166  RAD_SERVICE_FAILED = 4,
1167  RAD_SERVICE_STOPPED = 5
1168 } rad_service_state_t;
1169 
1171 typedef struct rad_module_info {
1172  char name[RAD_MODULE_NAME_MAX];
1173  char bus[RAD_DRIVER_NAME_MAX];
1174  char compatible[RAD_COMPATIBLE_MAX];
1175  rad_module_state_t state;
1176  int32_t last_status;
1177 } rad_module_info_t;
1178 
1180 typedef struct rad_service_config {
1181  uint32_t size;
1182  const char *tree_path;
1183  const char *backend;
1184  const char *display;
1185  const char *keyboard;
1186  const char *pointer;
1187  const char *terminal;
1188  int autostart;
1189  int order;
1190 } rad_service_config_t;
1191 
1193 typedef struct rad_service_descriptor {
1194  uint32_t size;
1195  const char *name;
1196  const char *compatible;
1197  const char *capability;
1198  int default_order;
1199  rad_status_t (*start)(void *context, const rad_service_config_t *config);
1200  void (*stop)(void *context);
1201  rad_status_t (*poll)(void *context);
1202  void *context;
1203 } rad_service_descriptor_t;
1204 
1206 typedef struct rad_service_info {
1207  char name[RAD_SERVICE_NAME_MAX];
1208  char compatible[RAD_SERVICE_COMPATIBLE_MAX];
1209  char capability[RAD_SERVICE_CAPABILITY_MAX];
1210  char tree_path[RAD_TREE_MAX_PATH];
1211  char backend[RAD_TREE_MAX_VALUE];
1212  char display[RAD_TREE_MAX_VALUE];
1213  char keyboard[RAD_TREE_MAX_VALUE];
1214  char pointer[RAD_TREE_MAX_VALUE];
1215  char terminal[RAD_TREE_MAX_VALUE];
1216  rad_service_state_t state;
1217  int autostart;
1218  int order;
1219  int32_t last_status;
1220 } rad_service_info_t;
1221 
1223 typedef struct rad_driver_info {
1224  char name[RAD_DRIVER_NAME_MAX];
1225  char bus[RAD_DRIVER_NAME_MAX];
1226  char compatible[RAD_COMPATIBLE_MAX];
1227  char role[RAD_DRIVER_NAME_MAX];
1228 } rad_driver_info_t;
1229 
1231 typedef struct rad_irq_domain_handle *rad_irq_domain_t;
1232 
1234 typedef struct rad_irq_domain_config {
1235  uint32_t size;
1236  const char *name;
1237  const char *tree_path;
1238  uint32_t interrupt_base;
1239  uint32_t line_count;
1240  uint32_t interrupt_cells;
1241 } rad_irq_domain_config_t;
1242 
1244 typedef struct rad_irq_resource {
1245  uint32_t irq;
1246  uint32_t line;
1247  uint32_t flags;
1248  rad_irq_trigger_t trigger;
1249  char domain[RAD_IRQ_DOMAIN_NAME_MAX];
1250  char controller_path[RAD_TREE_MAX_PATH];
1251 } rad_irq_resource_t;
1252 
1254 typedef struct rad_i2c_device_info {
1255  uint32_t bus_id;
1256  uint8_t address;
1257  uint32_t irq_count;
1258  rad_irq_resource_t irqs[RAD_IRQ_MAX_RESOURCES];
1259  char path[RAD_TREE_MAX_PATH];
1260  char compatible[RAD_COMPATIBLE_MAX];
1261  char driver[RAD_DRIVER_NAME_MAX];
1262  int bound;
1263 } rad_i2c_device_info_t;
1264 
1266 typedef struct rad_spi_device_info {
1267  uint32_t bus_id;
1268  uint8_t cs;
1269  uint32_t clock_hz;
1270  uint8_t mode;
1271  uint8_t bits_per_word;
1272  uint8_t transfer_mode;
1273  uint32_t irq_count;
1274  rad_irq_resource_t irqs[RAD_IRQ_MAX_RESOURCES];
1275  char path[RAD_TREE_MAX_PATH];
1276  char compatible[RAD_COMPATIBLE_MAX];
1277  char driver[RAD_DRIVER_NAME_MAX];
1278  int bound;
1279 } rad_spi_device_info_t;
1280 
1282 typedef struct rad_dma_channel_info {
1283  char controller[RAD_DRIVER_NAME_MAX];
1284  uint32_t index;
1285  uint32_t request_id;
1286  int allocated;
1287  int active;
1288 } rad_dma_channel_info_t;
1289 
1291 typedef struct rad_irq_info {
1292  uint32_t irq;
1293  char name[RAD_IRQ_NAME_MAX];
1294  int registered;
1295  int enabled;
1296  uint64_t count;
1297  uint64_t unhandled_count;
1298 } rad_irq_info_t;
1299 
1301 typedef struct rad_audio_format {
1302  uint32_t sample_rate;
1303  uint16_t channels;
1304  uint16_t bits_per_sample;
1305 } rad_audio_format_t;
1306 
1308 typedef struct rad_serial_config {
1309  uint32_t baud_rate;
1310  uint8_t data_bits;
1311  uint8_t stop_bits;
1312  uint8_t parity;
1313  uint8_t flow_control;
1314 } rad_serial_config_t;
1315 
1317 typedef struct rad_sd_config {
1318  rad_sd_mode_t mode;
1319  const char *device_name;
1320  const char *mount_point;
1321  uint8_t spi_instance;
1322  uint8_t sck_gpio;
1323  uint8_t tx_gpio;
1324  uint8_t rx_gpio;
1325  uint8_t cs_gpio;
1326  uint8_t pio_instance;
1327  uint8_t sdio_clk_gpio;
1328  uint8_t sdio_cmd_gpio;
1329  uint8_t sdio_dat0_gpio;
1330  uint8_t card_detect_gpio;
1331 } rad_sd_config_t;
1332 
1334 typedef void (*rad_task_entry_t)(void *context);
1336 typedef void (*rad_terminal_write_t)(const char *text, void *context);
1338 typedef rad_status_t (*rad_terminal_handler_t)(int argc, const char **argv, rad_terminal_write_t write, void *write_context, void *command_context);
1340 typedef void (*rad_tty_output_t)(const void *data, size_t size, void *context);
1342 typedef void (*rad_irq_handler_t)(uint32_t irq, void *context);
1344 typedef void (*rad_work_handler_t)(void *context);
1345 
1347 typedef struct rad_task_handle *rad_task_t;
1349 typedef struct rad_mutex_handle *rad_mutex_t;
1351 typedef struct rad_event_handle *rad_event_t;
1353 typedef struct rad_wait_queue_handle *rad_wait_queue_t;
1355 typedef struct rad_input_queue_handle *rad_input_queue_t;
1357 typedef struct rad_file_handle *rad_file_t;
1359 typedef struct rad_dir_handle *rad_dir_t;
1361 typedef struct rad_device_handle *rad_device_t;
1363 typedef struct rad_program_handle *rad_program_t;
1365 typedef struct rad_tty_handle *rad_tty_t;
1367 typedef struct rad_pty_handle *rad_pty_t;
1368 
1370 typedef struct rad_tty_window_size {
1371  uint16_t rows;
1372  uint16_t columns;
1373  uint16_t x_pixels;
1374  uint16_t y_pixels;
1375 } rad_tty_window_size_t;
1376 
1378 #define RAD_TTY_NCCS 32u
1380 #define RAD_TTY_FLUSH_INPUT 1u
1382 #define RAD_TTY_FLUSH_OUTPUT 2u
1383 
1385 typedef struct rad_tty_termios {
1386  uint32_t input_flags;
1387  uint32_t output_flags;
1388  uint32_t control_flags;
1389  uint32_t local_flags;
1390  uint32_t input_speed;
1391  uint32_t output_speed;
1392  uint8_t control_chars[RAD_TTY_NCCS];
1393 } rad_tty_termios_t;
1394 
1396 typedef struct rad_log_entry {
1397  uint64_t sequence;
1398  uint64_t time_millis;
1399  rad_log_level_t level;
1400  char category[RAD_LOG_CATEGORY_MAX];
1401  char message[RAD_LOG_MESSAGE_MAX];
1402 } rad_log_entry_t;

1759 
1760 #ifndef RADLIB_EMBEDDED_NO_CPP_WRAPPERS
1761 namespace RADEmbedded {
1762 
1763 class Kernel {
1764 public:
1765  static rad_status_t init(const char *backend = "linux_sim") {
1766  rad_kernel_config_t config{};
1767  config.backend_name = backend;
1768  return rad_kernel_init(&config); //< Public RADPx-OS kernel API entry point.
1769  }
1770  static void shutdown() { rad_kernel_shutdown(); }
1771  static bool initialized() { return rad_kernel_is_initialized() != 0; }
1772  static std::string backendName() { return rad_kernel_backend_name(); }
1773  static std::string version() { return rad_kernel_version_string(); }
1774 };
1775 
1776 class Mutex {
1777 public:
1778  Mutex() { rad_mutex_create(&handle_); }
1779  ~Mutex() { rad_mutex_destroy(handle_); }
1780  Mutex(const Mutex&) = delete;
1781  Mutex& operator=(const Mutex&) = delete;
1782  rad_status_t lock() { return rad_mutex_lock(handle_); }
1783  rad_status_t unlock() { return rad_mutex_unlock(handle_); }
1784  rad_mutex_t native() const { return handle_; }
1785 private:
1786  rad_mutex_t handle_ = nullptr;
1787 };
1788 
1789 class Event {
1790 public:
1791  explicit Event(bool signaled = false) { rad_event_create(&handle_, signaled ? 1 : 0); }
1792  ~Event() { rad_event_destroy(handle_); }
1793  Event(const Event&) = delete;
1794  Event& operator=(const Event&) = delete;
1795  rad_status_t wait(uint32_t timeoutMs) { return rad_event_wait(handle_, timeoutMs); }
1796  rad_status_t signal() { return rad_event_signal(handle_); }
1797  rad_status_t reset() { return rad_event_reset(handle_); }
1798 private:
1799  rad_event_t handle_ = nullptr;
1800 };
1801 
1802 class File {
1803 public:
1804  File() = default;
1805  ~File() { close(); }
1806  File(const File&) = delete;
1807  File& operator=(const File&) = delete;
1808  bool open(const char *path, uint32_t flags) { close(); return rad_vfs_open(path, flags, &handle_) == RAD_STATUS_OK; }
1809  size_t read(void *buffer, size_t size) { size_t done = 0; rad_vfs_read(handle_, buffer, size, &done); return done; }
1810  size_t write(const void *buffer, size_t size) { size_t done = 0; rad_vfs_write(handle_, buffer, size, &done); return done; }
1811  void close() { if (handle_) { rad_vfs_close(handle_); handle_ = nullptr; } }
1812 private:
1813  rad_file_t handle_ = nullptr;
1814 };
1815 
1816 } // namespace RADEmbedded
1817 #endif
1818 #endif
1819 
1820 #endif
